## Summary

-

Keep this short and focused. Avoid long AI-generated descriptions.

## Related Issue / Design Note

-

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run check`
- [ ] `bun test`
- [ ] `bun run coverage`
- [ ] `bun run crap`

## Notes

- [ ] Docs updated for user-visible behavior, credential changes, or resource changes.
- [ ] No secrets, local `.env` files, or live credentials are included.
- [ ] New resource or major behavior changes had an issue/design discussion first.
